Appearances:

Attorney Andres Sanchez appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Michael B. Reichling is present.
Attorney Hannah Oxley representing the defendant through full scope.

The Hon. Judge Curtis Karnow , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 608, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of May-21-2012 is vacated. (D501)
